## Type of contribution

- [ ] Historical/cultural correction
- [ ] City chapter
- [ ] DJ guide / glossary improvement
- [ ] Harm reduction / safety / accessibility improvement
- [ ] Source/link cleanup

## Source and safety checklist

- [ ] I included public sources for factual claims, or clearly labeled oral/local memory.
- [ ] I did not include private addresses, private event locations, personal contact info, credentials, or doxxing.
- [ ] I considered cultural attribution and avoided flattening local/underground history.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/verify.py` locally.
